notableEvents.label: Gunnar Henderson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Johnathan Rodríguez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Johnathan Rodríguez walks. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Pete Alonso to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Christian Koss to first baseman Rafael Devers. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Christian Koss to first baseman Rafael Devers. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Casey Schmitt out at 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee out at 1st.
